_comment: Override knobs for src/retrieval/policy.ts. Anything omitted falls back to DEFAULT_POLICY in code (see DEFAULT_POLICY in src/retrieval/policy.ts). Set TUBEROSA_RETRIEVAL_POLICY=/abs/path.json to point elsewhere. Phase 2 ships with DEFAULT_POLICY active; copy fields here to A/B-test before changing code defaults. Knobs available: useFreshnessMap, freshnessGlobal{currentDays,staleDays,stalePenalty}, freshnessPolicy.<itemType>{currentDays,staleDays,stalePenalty}, sourceWeights.<source>, hardSignalBoost.{sources,bonus}, hardSignalVectorPenalty, taskItemTypeBoosts[{taskType,itemTypes,bonus}], duplicateDetector, duplicateJaccardThreshold, duplicateCosineThreshold, piiRedaction.{emails,phones,ipv4}, domainMismatch.{enabled,mismatchPenalty,matchBoost}, suppressionEnabled.{stale,domainMismatch,feedback,superseded,evidenceMismatch}.
